source.description: Source is the URL or dataset reference the training data is loaded from.

type.description: Type is the dataset format (e.g. alpaca).

Dataset.description: Dataset describes a single training dataset for a fine-tuning job.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the aikitfile schema version. Must be v1alpha1.

target.description: Target selects the fine-tuning implementation to use (e.g. unsloth).

baseModel.description: BaseModel is the model the fine-tuning job starts from.

datasets.description: Datasets lists the training datasets used to fine-tune the base model.

config.description: Config holds the target-specific fine-tuning hyperparameters.

output.description: Output controls the format and name of the produced model.

FineTuneConfig.description: FineTuneConfig is the root aikitfile schema for a fine-tuning job that produces a customized model from a base model and datasets.

unsloth.description: Unsloth holds hyperparameters for the unsloth fine-tuning target.

FineTuneConfigSpec.description: FineTuneConfigSpec groups the per-target fine-tuning configuration blocks.

packing.description: Packing enables sequence packing to pack multiple short samples into one sequence.

maxSeqLength.description: MaxSeqLength is the maximum token sequence length for training (default 2048).

loadIn4bit.description: LoadIn4bit enables 4-bit quantized loading of the base model to reduce memory use.

batchSize.description: BatchSize is the per-device training batch size (default 2).

gradientAccumulationSteps.description: GradientAccumulationSteps is the number of steps to accumulate gradients before an update (default 4).

warmupSteps.description: WarmupSteps is the number of learning-rate warmup steps (default 10).

maxSteps.description: MaxSteps is the total number of training steps to run (default 60).

learningRate.description: LearningRate is the optimizer learning rate (default 0.0002).

loggingSteps.description: LoggingSteps is how often, in steps, training metrics are logged (default 1).

optimizer.description: Optimizer is the optimizer algorithm to use (default adamw_8bit).

weightDecay.description: WeightDecay is the weight-decay regularization factor (default 0.01).

lrSchedulerType.description: LrSchedulerType is the learning-rate scheduler type (default linear).

seed.description: Seed is the random seed used for reproducible training (default 42).

FineTuneConfigUnslothSpec.description: FineTuneConfigUnslothSpec holds the unsloth fine-tuning hyperparameters.

quantize.description: Quantize is the GGUF quantization format applied to the output model (default q4_k_m).

name.description: Name is the file name of the produced model (default aikit-model).

FineTuneOutputSpec.description: FineTuneOutputSpec controls how the fine-tuned model is exported.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion is the aikitfile schema version. Must be v1alpha1.

debug.description: Debug enables verbose debug logging in the built image.

runtime.description: Runtime selects the hardware acceleration runtime (e.g. cuda, rocm, applesilicon). Empty means CPU.

backends.description: Backends lists the inference backends to install (e.g. llama-cpp, diffusers, vllm).

models.description: Models lists the models to embed in or download into the image.

config.description: Config is the raw LocalAI model configuration appended verbatim to the image.

InferenceConfig.description: InferenceConfig is the root aikitfile schema for building an inference image that serves one or more models.

name.description: Name is the model identifier clients use to select this model.

source.description: Source is the URL or OCI reference the model is downloaded from.

sha256.description: SHA256 is the optional checksum used to verify the downloaded model.

promptTemplates.description: PromptTemplates are the named chat/prompt templates registered for this model.

Model.description: Model describes a single model to make available in the inference image.

name.description: Name is the template identifier referenced by the model configuration.

template.description: Template is the Go text/template body used to render the prompt.

PromptTemplate.description: PromptTemplate is a named Go text/template used to format prompts for a model.
